evals.prompt: I want to monetize an API endpoint in my SE-2 dApp with micropayments. When someone calls my API, they should pay a small amount of USDC to access the data.
evals.expected_output: A working x402 integration with middleware.ts, protected API route, env vars, and correct v2 API usage

assertions.description: Uses x402 v2 API (paymentProxy, x402ResourceServer, HTTPFacilitatorClient) not v1
Calls registerExactEvmScheme(server) in middleware to enable EVM payment processing
Uses CAIP-2 network identifier format (eip155:84532) not legacy names like 'base-sepolia'
Creates paywall UI with createPaywall().withNetwork(evmPaywall) pattern
A protected API route handler exists (under /api/payment/ or similar)
Environment variables for facilitator URL, wallet address, and network are set up
x402 packages (@x402/core, @x402/evm, @x402/next, @x402/paywall) added to nextjs package.json
Next.js middleware matcher config covers the protected routes
scaffold.config.ts targets baseSepolia for x402 (not hardhat localhost)
